pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 62 (qcp_name = "Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens"), task.json description, export_result.sh line 72 (verification check)
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 30-35 (product search and creation with name 'Acoustic Bloc Screens'), task.json description, export_result.sh line 67 (verification check for old product removal)
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 41-48 (product search and creation with name 'Office Chair'), task.json description, export_result.sh line 58 (verification check for correct product association)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves changing a Quality Control Point (QCP) named 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens' from being associated with the product 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' to 'Office Chair'. All three metadata claims are verified: the QCP name is 'Visual Inspection - Incoming Screens', the old product is 'Acoustic Bloc Screens', and the new product is 'Office Chair'. These values are created and managed by the task setup and export scripts using Odoo 17's XML-RPC API. The products 'Acoustic Bloc Screens' is a standard Odoo demo product (confirmed in Odoo GitHub repository), while 'Office Chair' is a common Odoo furniture product. The data is synthetic as it is created specifically for this task by the setup_task.sh script and verified by export_result.sh.
